MemX — Product Hunt gallery cards (light)

Persona-led gallery at Product Hunt size (1270×760), shown scaled. Apple-caliber light theme — one refined background, single accent, screenshots as the hero. Per-card PNGs in ph_export/.

MemX
Meet MemX
Your whole life.
One question away.
The AI memory app that saves what matters — and hands it back the moment you ask.

MemX
Capture anything
Save it the second
it happens.

Card 4 · Voice
MemX
Hands-free
Too busy to type?
Just talk to it.
Speak a thought or ask a question — MemX listens, transcribes, and remembers. No typing needed.

MemX
Ask anything
Ask a question.
Get the exact answer.

MemX speaks
your language.

findable in seconds.

Never forget
It remembers,
so you don't have to.
